business.name: Law Offices of Norman J. Homen
business.tagline: Fighting for California Workers' Rights for Over 30 Years

attorney.name: Norman J. Homen
attorney.title: Attorney at Law
attorney.bio: Norman J. Homen has been fighting for the rights of injured workers and disabled Californians for over 30 years. His firm handles workers' compensation claims, personal injury cases, and Social Security Disability Insurance (SSDI) and Supplemental Security Income (SSI) applications and appeals throughout California.

practice_areas.name: Workers' Compensation
practice_areas.description: Injured on the job? We fight to ensure you receive the full benefits you deserve — medical treatment, temporary disability, permanent disability, and vocational rehabilitation.

practice_areas.name: Personal Injury
practice_areas.description: If you have been injured due to someone else's negligence, we will pursue maximum compensation for your medical bills, lost wages, pain and suffering, and other damages.

practice_areas.name: Social Security Disability
practice_areas.description: We guide clients through every stage of the SSDI and SSI process — from initial applications through Administrative Law Judge hearings, Appeals Council review, and federal court representation.

testimonials.name: Marisol Huggins
testimonials.text: After filing my case with them, they were constantly communicating with me through the whole process. I felt supported every step of the way.

testimonials.name: Dean Hsiao
testimonials.text: These guys and gals don't give up. Persistence pays off and they got my Social Security approved.

testimonials.name: Tristan Owens
testimonials.text: Thank you for helping me win my SSI case! Without you I wouldn't have been able to win.

testimonials.name: Leticia Esquerra
testimonials.text: Thank you to Mr. Moises for his attentive support throughout my Social Security case. Professional, caring, and effective.
